tasks.label: ashia smoke check
args: Set-Location e:\ashia; docker compose ps; Write-Host '--- URL checks ---'; $urls=@('http://localhost:3000/login','http://localhost:8080/api/v1/docs','http://localhost:9090','http://localhost:16686'); foreach($u in $urls){ try{$r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "$u => $($r.StatusCode)"} catch { Write-Host "$u => ERROR: $($_.Exception.Message)" } }; Write-Host '--- Prometheus up query ---'; try { $p=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:9090/api/v1/query?query=up' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host $p.Content } catch { Write-Host "PROM ERROR: $($_.Exception.Message)" }; Write-Host '--- Jaeger services API ---'; try { $j=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:16686/api/services' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host $j.Content } catch { Write-Host "JAEGER ERROR: $($_.Exception.Message)" }
